channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: I’m a tech expert: 10 AI prompts you’ll use all the time
item.description: From proofreading and research to brainstorming and data analysis, you can use generative AI as a sidekick for just about any task you can dream of.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Google makes its appeal to overturn jury verdict branding the Play Store as illegal monopoly
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google went to appeals court Monday in an attempt to convince a three-judge panel to overturn a jury's verdict declaring its app store for Android smartphones as an illegal monopoly and block the penalties imposed by a federal judge to stop the misbehavior.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Canada's most populous province to pause retaliatory measures as US puts tariffs on hold
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — The leader of Ontario, Canada’s most populous province, said Monday he will pause all retaliatory measures against the United States after news broke that the threat of tariffs has been put on hold for a month.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Dramatic drop in monarch butterfly count nears record 30-year low
item.description: The number of monarch butterflies spending the winter in the western United States dropped dramatically this year even as federal officials move to extend protections for the beloved pollinator.
item.dc:creator: Todd Richmond, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump signs order to create US sovereign wealth fund, eyeing TikTok purchase
item.description: President Trump on Monday directed secretaries to begin a process to create an American sovereign wealth fund, suggesting it could partially own the popular app TikTok.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Microsoft creates a new department to review how AI affects society
item.description: As part of Microsoft’s big push into AI services, the company has created a new department called the Advanced Planning Unit (APU). Employees of the APU will, among other things, study the effects of AI on society and make recommendations about which products are worth investing resources in.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 25 enterprise tech predictions and goals for 2025, from APAC CIOs
item.description: As enterprises across Southeast Asia and Hong Kong undergo rapid digitalisation, democratisation of artificial intelligence (AI) and evolving cloud strategies are reshaping how they operate.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Google teams up with Samsung to take on Dolby Atmos
item.description: A helicopter flying over your head, the ground rumbling under your feet, bullets whizzing by your ears: If it’s up to Google and Samsung, then your movie nights will soon sound like you’re in the middle of the action.
item.dc:creator: Janko Roettgers, Fast Company

item.title: VMware by Broadcom: Product, service and support news
item.description: News of Broadcom’s plans to acquire VMware triggered concerns among customers, partners, and industry watchers, many of whom recalled Broadcom’s track record with prior high-profile acquisitions, including network switching vendor Brocade in 2016 for almost $6 billion, software firm CA Technologies
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Microsoft founder Bill Gates explores the making of his internal operating system in new memoir
item.description: As he prepares to turn 70 later this year, Microsoft founder Bill Gates' new memoir explores how his childhood quirks, upbringing, friendships and experiences coalesced into shaping his internal operating system.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Most talked-about Super Bowl ads
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says Super Bowl 2025 ads promise star power and laughs, featuring Beckham's twin reveal.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Big rigs deliver cargo with no humans at the wheel
item.description: First driverless semi delivers 100 loads in Texas, transforming logistics with AI. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson gives his takeaways.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 16 professional organizations for Black IT pros
item.description: Despite diversity being a much-discussed topic in the tech industry, representation for Black tech workers is still not where it needs to be, with African Americans holding just 7% of the positions and only 2% of tech executive roles, according to data from the 2022 Diversity in High Tech report pub
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: SoftBank and OpenAI set up joint company to push artificial intelligence services
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japanese technology giant SoftBank Group and OpenAI stepped up their AI partnership Monday, setting up a 50-50 held company called SB OpenAI Japan.
item.dc:creator: YURI KAGEYAMA, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: The DeepSeek lesson
item.description: During the past two weeks, DeepSeek unraveled Silicon Valley’s comfortable narrative about generative artificial intelligence by introducing dramatically more efficient ways to scale large language models (LLMs).
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: IDC and e& enterprise to lead AI Innovation at 18th annual Middle East CIO Summit
item.description: The 18th Annual IDC Middle East CIO Summit is set to explore the dynamic world of artificial intelligence and its potential to drive business success.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Texas governor orders ban on DeepSeek, RedNote for government devices
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Texas Republican Gov. Greg Abbott issued a ban on Chinese artificial intelligence company DeepSeek for government-issued devices, becoming the first state to restrict the popular chatbot in such a manner.
item.dc:creator: NADIA LATHAN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Italy blocked AI app DeepSeek in Apple and Google stores. Here’s why
item.description: The Chinese artificial intelligence app DeepSeek could not be accessed on Wednesday in Apple and Google app stores in Italy, the day after the country’s data protection authority requested information on its use of personal data.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Trump vows sweeping tariffs on oil, pharmaceuticals and semiconductors
item.description: President Trump on Friday vowed to impose sweeping tariffs on semiconductor chips, pharmaceuticals, steel and aluminum and oil and gas. "We'll be doing pharmaceuticals. Importantly in drugs and medicines, etc. All forms of medicine and pharmaceuticals," Trump said.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, The Hill

item.title: World's first AI-designed, 3D-printed shoe wants to be the next Crocs
item.description: A startup claims to have developed the world's first entirely artificial intelligence-designed and 3D-printed shoe, the brainchild of a 25-year-old.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What is NaaS? Providers, delivery models, and benefits explained
item.description: Network as a service (NaaS) is a cloud service model that’s designed to let enterprise IT professionals order network infrastructure components from a menu of options, have them configured to fit their business needs, and have the whole thing delivered, running and managed in a matter of hours inste
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Amazon sues state agency to block release of company records to Bezos-owned Washington Post
item.description: Amazon is suing a Washington state agency to prevent the release of some company materials to The Washington Post, the newspaper which is owned by Amazon founder Jeff Bezos.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Alibaba introduces Qwen 2.5-Max AI model, claims edge over DeepSeek
item.description: China’s Alibaba Group has launched an upgraded version of its Qwen 2.5 AI model, claiming it outperforms models from DeepSeek, OpenAI, and Meta, as competition in the AI market intensifies.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Cybersecurity has had its ups and downs as we head into 2025
item.description: Last year was an eventful one on the cybersecurity front. But big cyber developments in the federal scape are expected in 2025. The post Cybersecurity has had its ups and downs as we head into 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Did DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make new AI chatbot? Trump adviser thinks so
item.description: Did the upstart Chinese tech company DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make the artificial intelligence technology that shook Wall Street this week? That's what ChatGPT maker OpenAI is suggesting, along with U.S. President Donald Trump's top AI adviser.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: UnitedHealth cyberattack exposes 190 million in largest US healthcare data breach
item.description: The number of people affected by a UnitedHealth data breach in February 2024 was actually higher than previously reported and was the largest medical data breach in U.S. history.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The biggest ideas in software and technology today
item.description: One of the coolest things about being a software developer is that you often know what’s behind the curtain. To some extent, at least.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Federal employee lawsuit alleges security, privacy risks in new OPM communications system
item.description: The plaintiffs claim OPM violated the E-Government Act by not releasing details of how the email system will manage federal employees’ personal information. The post Federal employee lawsuit alleges security, privacy risks in new OPM communications system first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Drew Friedman, Federal News Network

item.title: How to share a YouTube video starting at a specific time
item.description: Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says these steps ensure that your friends and family get to the exact moment you want them to see. Try it out and streamline your sharing experience.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
